title: User Authentication - Successful Login
description: Verify that a user with valid credentials can log in successfully and receive a JWT token with correct role-based access permissions.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page.
Input valid username/email and password.
Click the login button.
Verify the user is authenticated and a valid JWT token is issued.
Verify user role permissions are correctly applied in the system.

title: User Authentication - Failed Login with Incorrect Credentials
description: Verify that a user cannot log in with invalid credentials and that proper error messages are shown.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page.
Input invalid username/email or password.
Click the login button.
Verify the login attempt fails with an appropriate error message.

title: Product Management - Create New Product
description: Ensure that an admin user can create a new product with variants, attributes, pricing, and inventory details.

steps.description: Log in as admin and navigate to the product creation page.
Input product details including name, description, attributes, and pricing.
Add product variants and set inventory counts.
Click save to create the product.
Verify the product has been created successfully and is visible in the product list.
Verify inventory and pricing details are correctly saved.

title: Product Management - Edit Existing Product
description: Verify that an admin user can edit an existing product's information, including updating inventory and pricing.

steps.description: Log in as admin and navigate to an existing product's edit page.
Change product attributes, pricing, and inventory values.
Save the changes.
Verify the updates are reflected accurately upon saving.

title: Order Management - Complete Order Lifecycle
description: Test the entire order lifecycle including order creation, fulfillment, invoicing, refunds, and status updates.

steps.description: Place a new order via storefront with valid products and customer details.
Verify the order is created with correct details and status is 'Pending'.
As admin, fulfill the order and update status to 'Fulfilled'.
Verify that fulfillment details are recorded and status updated correctly.
Generate and download invoice for the order.
Validate invoice accuracy and presence in order details.
Issue a refund partially or fully on the order.
Verify refund status and that the order reflects the refund.

title: Customer Account Management - View Order History
description: Verify that a logged-in customer can view their complete order history and order details.

steps.description: Log in as a customer.
Navigate to the account order history page.
Verify all past orders are listed with correct statuses and details.
Open individual order details.
Verify order details display correctly including items, prices, and shipping info.

title: Discount System - Apply Valid Discount Code at Checkout
description: Ensure a valid discount code can be applied successfully during checkout and reflected in order totals.

steps.description: Add products to cart and proceed to checkout.
Enter a valid discount code and apply it.
Verify the discount is applied and total price is updated accordingly.
Complete the checkout process.
Verify the order reflects the discounted price.

title: Discount System - Reject Invalid or Expired Discount Codes
description: Verify that invalid or expired discount codes cannot be applied and proper error messages are shown.

steps.description: Add items to cart and proceed to checkout.
Input an invalid or expired discount code.
Attempt to apply the discount code.
Verify the system rejects the code and displays an appropriate error message.

title: Stripe Payment Integration - Successful Payment Flow
description: Test the complete payment flow using Stripe including payment submission, webhook confirmation, and order status update.

steps.description: Proceed to checkout with valid order details.
Enter valid payment details and submit payment via Stripe.
Verify payment is accepted and processed by Stripe.
Simulate Stripe webhook confirming payment success.
Verify the order status updates to 'Paid' and receipt is generated.

title: Stripe Payment Integration - Payment Failure Handling
description: Ensure that payment failures via Stripe are handled gracefully with clear error messages and no order confirmation.

steps.description: Proceed to checkout with valid order details.
Enter invalid or declined payment details and submit payment.
Verify payment is rejected and appropriate error message is shown to the user.
Verify that no order confirmation is issued and order status remains 'Pending' or 'Failed'.

title: Admin Dashboard - Responsiveness and UI Elements
description: Validate that the admin dashboard UI renders correctly and is responsive across desktop and mobile devices.

steps.description: Access the admin dashboard on desktop at various screen resolutions.
Verify all UI components (tables, buttons, dialogs) display and function correctly.
Access the admin dashboard on a mobile device or emulator.
Verify UI responsiveness and usability on small screens.

title: Multi-Currency Pricing - Display and Checkout
description: Verify that products display correct prices in the selected currency and the checkout reflects the chosen currency accurately.

steps.description: Switch storefront currency to a target currency.
Verify product prices update to reflect the selected currency.
Add products to cart and proceed to checkout.
Verify order totals and payment amounts use the selected currency.

title: Internationalization - Language Switching and Content Translation
description: Ensure that the storefront supports multiple languages and that UI elements and product content translate correctly upon language switch.

steps.description: Access the storefront and switch language via locale selector.
Verify all static UI elements translate appropriately.
Verify translated product names, descriptions, and other localized content appear correctly.

title: Shipping Management - Configure Shipping Zones and Rates
description: Verify that admin can create shipping zones, add shipping methods with rates, and that these are applied correctly during checkout.

steps.description: Log in as admin and navigate to shipping configuration.
Create a new shipping zone for a specified region.
Add one or more shipping methods with rates to the zone.
Save configuration.
From storefront, place an order with shipping address in the configured zone.
Verify that appropriate shipping methods and rates are presented during checkout.

title: Security - Role-Based Access Control Enforcement
description: Ensure that users can access only authorized areas and features based on their assigned roles and permissions.

steps.description: Log in as a user with limited role/permission.
Attempt to access restricted admin features or APIs.
Verify access is denied and appropriate error or forbidden message is shown.
Log in as an admin or higher-privilege user.
Verify full access is granted to authorized features.

title: GraphQL API - Key Queries and Mutations Validity
description: Test core GraphQL queries and mutations such as product retrieval, order creation, and customer data management to ensure API correctness.

steps.description: Send GraphQL query to retrieve product list with attributes.
Verify response contains correct product data according to schema.
Send mutation to create a new order with valid input.
Verify order is created and returned data matches input.
Perform mutation to update customer details.
Verify customer data updates correctly in response.

title: Checkout Flow - End-to-End Customer Order Placement
description: Verify the complete customer shopping flow from product browsing, adding to cart, entering shipping/payment details, completing checkout, and receiving order confirmation.

steps.description: Browse product catalog and select desired products.
Add selected products to shopping cart.
Proceed to checkout, enter shipping address and select shipping method.
Enter valid payment details and complete the payment.
Verify order confirmation page is displayed with correct order summary.
Verify order details are visible in customer account order history.

title: Performance - API Response and Page Load Time
description: Verify that key API responses return within 500 ms and that page loads in both admin and storefront meet sub-3 seconds benchmarks.

steps.description: Measure response time for common GraphQL queries e.g., product list, order details.
Verify response times are less than 500 ms.
Load key pages in admin dashboard and storefront at average network conditions.
Verify pages load within 3 seconds consistently.

title: Email Notification - SMTP Email Sending on Order Events
description: Verify that order confirmation and shipping update emails are sent correctly via SMTP app after the respective events occur.

steps.description: Place an order and complete payment.
Verify order confirmation email is sent to the customer.
Update order status to shipped.
Verify shipping update email is sent to the customer.

title: App Management - Install and Configure Stripe App
description: Ensure that the Stripe payment gateway app can be installed, configured, and activated via the admin interface.

steps.description: Log in as admin and navigate to app management.
Install the Stripe app.
Configure required Stripe API keys and settings.
Activate the Stripe app.
Verify the Stripe app is active and ready for payment processing.
